children.heading: Priority for low-income women
children.label: a Priority for low-income women
children.text: The Secretary may not make a grant under unless the State involved agrees that low-income women will be given priority in the provision of services and activities pursuant to paragraphs (1) and (2) of .section 300k of this titlesection 300k(a) of this title

children.heading: Limitation on imposition of fees for services
children.label: b Limitation on imposition of fees for services

children.text: will be made according to a schedule of charges that is made available to the public;
will be adjusted to reflect the income of the woman involved; and

will not be imposed on any woman with an income of less than 100 percent of the official poverty line, as established by the Director of the Office of Management and Budget and revised by the Secretary in accordance with .section 9902(2) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary may not make a grant under unless the State involved agrees that services and activities under the grant will be made available throughout the State, including availability to members of any Indian tribe or tribal organization (as such terms are defined in ).section 300k of this titlesection 5304 of title 25

children.heading: Waiver
children.label: 2 Waiver
children.text: The Secretary may waive the requirement established in paragraph (1) for a State if the Secretary determines that compliance by the State with the requirement would result in an inefficient allocation of resources with respect to carrying out the purpose described in .section 300k(a) of this title

children.heading: Grants to tribes and tribal organizations
children.label: 3 Grants to tribes and tribal organizations
A
children.text: The Secretary, acting through the Director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, may make grants to tribes and tribal organizations (as such terms are used in paragraph (1)) for the purpose of carrying out programs described in . This subchapter applies to such a grant (in relation to the jurisdiction of the tribe or organization) to the same extent and in the same manner as such subchapter applies to a grant to a State under (in relation to the jurisdiction of the State).section 300k(a) of this titlesection 300k of this title

children.label: B
children.text: If a tribe or tribal organization is receiving a grant under subparagraph (A) and the State in which the tribe or organization is located is receiving a grant under , the requirement established in paragraph (1) for the State regarding the tribe or organization is deemed to have been waived under paragraph (2).section 300k of this title

children.heading: Relationship to items and services under other programs
children.label: d Relationship to items and services under other programs

children.text: under any State compensation program, under an insurance policy, or under any Federal or State health benefits program; or
by an entity that provides health services on a prepaid basis.

children.heading: Coordination with other breast and cervical cancer programs
children.label: e Coordination with other breast and cervical cancer programs
children.text: The Secretary may not make a grant under unless the State involved agrees that the services and activities funded through the grant shall be coordinated with other Federal, State, and local breast and cervical cancer programs.section 300k of this title

children.heading: Limitation on administrative expenses
children.label: f Limitation on administrative expenses
children.text: The Secretary may not make a grant under unless the State involved agrees that not more than 10 percent of the grant will be expended for administrative expenses with respect to the grant.section 300k of this title

children.heading: Restrictions on use of grant
children.label: g Restrictions on use of grant
children.text: The Secretary may not make a grant under unless the State involved agrees that the grant will not be expended to provide inpatient hospital services for any individual.section 300k of this title

the State will establish such fiscal control and fund accounting procedures as may be necessary to ensure the proper disbursal of, and accounting for, amounts received by the State under such section; and

upon request, the State will provide records maintained pursuant to paragraph (1) to the Secretary or the Comptroller of the United States for purposes of auditing the expenditures by the State of the grant.

children.heading: Reports to Secretary
children.label: i Reports to Secretary
children.text: The Secretary may not make a grant under unless the State involved agrees to submit to the Secretary such reports as the Secretary may require with respect to the grant.section 300k of this title
